# Recaps

> Project recaps generated by `/project-recap <name>`.

## Structure

```
recaps/
├── <project-1>/
│   ├── YYYY-MM-DD.md
│   └── ...
├── <project-2>/
└── ...
```

One subfolder per project. Each file is a dated recap (default: weekly cadence).

## Generated by

`/project-recap <name> --save` — see `C04 Claude Obsidian/02 Skills & Commands/project-recap.md`.

## Why this lives in B05 (not C04)

C04 holds the AI's internal logs (audit trail of what I did). Recaps are **outputs YOU consume** for standups and weeklies — they belong in your operational space.
